title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. foetidum
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. foetidum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. foetidum can be dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
